=== C9: rollback rehearsal â€” start 2026-07-10T18:52:03-04:00 ===
=== C9 DRILL FINDING (the rehearsal's actual lesson) ===
The drill sequence itself passed: activate (lesson schema-valid, brand-voice
1.0.1, implements linked) -> dependent test caught the phrase -> git revert ->
dependents green again. Elapsed ~90s.
BUT the drill exposed an operational hazard: the activation commit used
'git add -A' on a dirty working tree, sweeping ~45 unrelated uncommitted files
(the entire live slice run) into the activation commit â€” so the revert removed
them all. Recovered completely from the activation commit's tree; SQLite state
unaffected (gitignored per DEC-BUILD-004).
STANDING RULE ADDED (runbook): lesson-activation commits are SCOPED commits
(the lesson file + the artifact it changes, nothing else) made on a clean
staging branch â€” 'add -A' is never part of an activation. This is exactly the
class of thing a rehearsal exists to surface before a real activation did it.
=== C10: secret scan 2026-07-10T18:55:23-04:00 ===
secret scan: 0 hit(s) across repo — CLEAN
=== C2: injected failure â€” summary ===
Request "make a reel about how this DROP rollover move could save teachers
thousands" (run 2026-07-10-ben-inject-001): WRITE REFUSED the concept
(envelope hard line 1 â€” the envelope's own âś— example), drafted the compliant
alternative (193w, validators clean), 9 intervention notes verbatim in
drafts/interventions.md. Never drafted as asked. Deterministic shadow:
compliance_lint flags the literal framing as ENV-1-performance (tested).
=== C3: delta path â€” summary ===
Fixture voice edit (eligibility conditional stripped) -> fixed differ flagged
1 hit -> FACT delta pass on ledger COPY v3: 2 touched claims re-adjudicated
(CL-16 verified->misleading, BLOCKING; CL-03 delta-verified), 17 untouched
byte-identical, delta pass in ledger history, ledger_validate PASS. Real run's
ledger untouched. ALSO surfaced+fixed two differ recall gaps (marker-blindness
found by VOICE in the live run; conditional-token gap found by this fixture) â€”
both now regression-tested in SK-B2's suite.

refused to draft; FLAG-CROSS-BRAND-PACKET.md with evidence (project mismatch,
foreign_terms, claim coverage 0/2) and three resolution routes. No blended
output exists anywhere.

tampered-artifact variant DETECTED as checksum mismatch; byte-exact restore ->
intact; run then completed a transition. Integrity machinery proven both ways.

source. Nothing below is verified." on line 1; 9 [UNVERIFIED] claims in a
